passing_score_scale: Scaled score 300–600; passing score is 450 for both OTR and COTA exams
exam_format: Computer-adaptive at Pearson VUE testing centers

testing_centers.notes: OTR and COTA examinations are administered at Pearson VUE testing centers. Schedule online at home.pearsonvue.com/nbcot. Online proctored testing may be available; check NBCOT website for current options.

id_requirements: Government-issued photo ID required. Name must match NBCOT registration exactly. Secondary form of ID may be required.
exam_rules: No personal items, notes, phones, or reference materials permitted in testing room. NBCOT eligibility verification required before scheduling. Exam includes scored and unscored (pretest) items; unscored items not identified. Results reported as pass/fail with scaled score; domain performance feedback provided.
renewal_options: NBCOT certification renews on a 3-year cycle. 36 Professional Development Units (PDUs) required per renewal period. PDUs must align with NBCOT-approved categories (professional development, scholarship, service). Renewal fee applies; failure to renew results in certification lapse. Lapsed certification requires meeting current reinstatement requirements.

prerequisites.description: Graduate of an ACOTE-accredited occupational therapy program (master's or doctoral level); completion of Level II fieldwork

retake_policy.notes: 45-day waiting period between attempts. Maximum of 4 attempts; after the 4th failed attempt, candidate must demonstrate remediation (e.g., additional coursework) before NBCOT will approve further attempts. Each attempt requires full exam fee payment and new eligibility application.

domains.name: Acquire and Interpret Information to Guide OT Practice
Formulate, Implement, Evaluate, and Modify an Intervention Plan
Gather and Reason Through Information to Direct OT Practice

official_study_resources.title: NBCOT Candidate Handbook
official_study_resources.notes: Official handbook with exam content outline, policies, and preparation guidance

official_study_resources.title: NBCOT OTR/COTA Practice Exams
official_study_resources.notes: Official practice exams available through NBCOT exam prep portal
